### 3. Navigation Structure

Navigation comes from `.. toctree::` directives in `source/index.rst`:

| # | Section | Content |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **0-truba** | TRUBA user accounts, membership, applications |
| 2 | **1-kaynaklar** | Resources (ARF, ARF ACC, MN5, EuroHPC, YZ Fabrikaları) |
| 3 | **2-temel_bilgiler** | Basics: clusters, connection, file transfer, SLURM, applications, GPU |
| 4 | **3-egitim_seminerler** | Trainings/seminars |
| 5 | **4-proje_hesaplari_ucretli_kullanim** | Paid project usage, pricing |
| 6 | **5-sikca_sorulan_sorular** | FAQ |

`2-temel_bilgiler` subsections:

- TRUBA connection: OpenVPN, SSH, Open OnDemand, Monitoring
- File transfer: MobaXterm, WinSCP
- Resource management: TRUBA commands, Linux, SLURM, MPI
- Applications and libraries, containers, **GPU**

---

### 4. HPC-, GPU-, and AI-related Sections

#### HPC / clusters

| Location | Content |
|----------|---------|
| `1-kaynaklar/arf/` | ARF cluster (queues, storage, GPU queues barbun-cuda, akya-cuda) |
| `1-kaynaklar/arf_acc/` | ARF ACC cluster (P100, V100, A100, H100, H200 GPUs) |
| `1-kaynaklar/mn5/` | MareNostrum 5 (BSC) documentation |
| `1-kaynaklar/eurohpc/` | EuroHPC JU, access calls, supercomputers |
| `3-egitim_seminerler/cfd/hpc/` | HPC for CFD: TRUBA, EuroCC, METU, İTÜ clusters, MPI/OpenMP/CUDA |
| `2-temel_bilgiler/hesaplama_kumeleri.rst` | Calculation clusters |

#### GPU

| Location | Content |
|----------|---------|
| `2-temel_bilgiler/gpu.rst` | GPU guide: SLURM `--gres=gpu:n`, queues (barbun-cuda, akya-cuda, palamut-cuda, kolyoz-cuda), P100, V100, A100, H100, H200 |
| `1-kaynaklar/arf/arf_kuyruk_bilgisi.rst` | GPU queues (barbun-cuda, akya-cuda) |
| `4-proje_hesaplari_ucretli_kullanim/` | GPU pricing (H100 80GB, H200 141GB, Kolyoz servers) |
| `2-temel_bilgiler/uygulamalar/Gromacs/gromacs_gpu.rst` | GROMACS on GPU |

#### CUDA training

- `3-egitim_seminerler/cuda/`: CUDA intro, C/C++, parallel model, memory, streams, multi-GPU, debugging/profiling

#### AI / ML / deep learning

| Location | Content |
|----------|---------|
| `1-kaynaklar/yz_fabrikalari/` | EuroHPC AI factories |
| `2-temel_bilgiler/uygulamalar/Python/python.rst` | `apps/truba-ai/cpu-2024.0`, `apps/truba-ai/gpu-2024.0` (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, XGBoost, etc.) |
| `3-egitim_seminerler/pytorch/` | PyTorch: intro, tensors, log_reg, DNN, CNN, distributed, GNN |
| `3-egitim_seminerler/keras/` | Keras: TensorFlow, GPU training on TRUBA |
| `3-egitim_seminerler/big-data/` | Spark ML (collaborative filtering, model selection, pipelines) |
| `3-egitim_seminerler/qcomp/hybrid-nets/` | Quantum–classical hybrid networks (Keras, Torch) |

#### EuroHPC supercomputers

- `1-kaynaklar/eurohpc/superbilgisayar/lumi.rst` – LUMI (GPU partition, AMD Instinct MI250X)
- `1-kaynaklar/eurohpc/superbilgisayar/leonardo.rst` – Leonardo
- `1-kaynaklar/eurohpc/superbilgisayar/marenostrum_5.rst` – MareNostrum 5
- `1-kaynaklar/eurohpc/superbilgisayar/meluxina.rst` – Meluxina

---

### 5. Document Format and Language

- **Format:** reStructuredText (`.rst`)
- **Language:** Turkish
- **Assets:** Images in `source/_static/` and `assets/`, PDFs in `source/_static/pdf/cuda/`
- **Build:** Standard Sphinx (`make html` or `sphinx-build`; `SOURCEDIR=source`, `BUILDDIR=build`)

---
